name: Swiss Mocha Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Transfer the mixture to a blender and process until it becomes a fine powder.
3. For each 4 oz (approximately 118 ml) cup of hot water, use 2 tablespoons of the powdered mix.
4. This will yield about 2 cups of prepared mix.
